criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience, such as through AI-generated content, personalized recommendations, or interactive AI features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, official websites, user reviews

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and activity within the app, including metrics like daily active users, session length, and user retention rates.
criteria.sources: App analytics reports, user reviews, industry analyses

criteria.name: Innovative Features
criteria.description: The presence of unique and novel functionalities that distinguish the app from competitors, such as virtual avatars, AI-driven matchmaking, or interactive AI companions.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, official announcements, tech reviews

criteria.name: Market Popularity
criteria.description: The app's standing in the market, indicated by download numbers, app store rankings, and overall user base size.
criteria.sources: App store data, market research reports, press releases

criteria.name: User Satisfaction
criteria.description: The overall satisfaction of users, reflected in app ratings, reviews, and feedback highlighting the app's performance, usability, and value.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, customer feedback surveys
